# pheno-config

> Canonical typed-config loader for the pheno-* fleet. 12-factor
> `combine()` that overlays env over TOML/JSON.

## Public API

- `Config` — typed config struct with `from_env()`, `from_file(path)`,
  `from_json(value)`, `combine(other)` (env wins)
- `ConfigBuilder` — fluent builder with `.env()`, `.file()`, `.profile()`,
  `.build()` chaining
- `combine(base, overlay)` — generic 12-factor cascade; `overlay` wins on
  conflict (env > file > default)
- `load_toml(path)`, `load_json(path)` — file loaders; both return
  `Result<HashMap<String, Value>, ConfigError>`
- `ConfigError` — `thiserror`-based error type with `Io`, `Parse`,
  `Missing { key }`, `Type { key, expected }` variants

## Quickstart

```rust
use pheno_config::{Config, ConfigBuilder};
let cfg = ConfigBuilder::new()
    .file("config.toml")
    .env("PHENO_")  // prefix
    .build()?;
let port: u16 = cfg.get("port")?;
```

## Files

- `Cargo.toml` — package manifest (v0.2.0)
- `src/lib.rs` — library root (Config struct, ConfigBuilder, loaders, combine())
- `tests/config_test.rs` — env/JSON loaders + ConfigBuilder
- `tests/toml_merge_test.rs` — TOML parsing, merge semantics, combine precedence
- `docs/twelve-factor.md` — 12-factor contract deep-dive
- `README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `WORKLOG.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`
- `LICENSE-MIT`, `LICENSE-APACHE` — dual license

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`)
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`)
- 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-040)
- TOML/JSON/env parsing; `thiserror` for error types
- Public API surface fully documented (`#![warn(missing_docs)]`)
- No `unwrap()` in public API; all fallible ops return `Result<T, ConfigError>`

## See also

- `pheno-context` — request context propagation
- `pheno-flags` — feature flag config layer
- `pheno-errors` — `thiserror`-aligned error envelope
- `pheno-port-adapter` — config injection for port adapters
- `pheno-cli-base` — `ConfigArg` integration for CLI parsing
- ADR-022 (config consolidation), ADR-040 (coverage gates)
